S.FORM: = Filip Vujanović = Mntucing hngkawas 1954 idas 9 jiyax 1 ka Filip Vujanović ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Montenegro ta sayang o kiya ka Filip Vujanović, pnaah hngkawas 2003 idas 5 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = *ilip *uɟano*i* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka *ilip *uɟano*i* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan montənəgɾo ta sajaŋ o kija ka *ilip *uɟano*i*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Filip Vujanović = Mntucing hngkawas 1954 idas 9 jiyax 1 ka Filip Vujanović ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Montenegro ta sayang o kiya ka Filip Vujanović, pnaah hngkawas 2003 idas 5 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = *ilip *uɟano*i* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka *ilip *uɟano*i* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan montənəgɾo ta sajaŋ o kija ka *ilip *uɟano*i*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
